Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.SplitMonicsAndEpis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Comonads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.MorphismClass.

New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.

New coercion path [total_morcls_disp_arrow] : ob >-> ob is not definitionally an identity function.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Arrow.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.


Local Open Scope cat.

Section Examples.
Context {C : category}.
Context (CC : BinCoproducts C).

Definition cop_ff_cop (f : arrow C) : BinCoproduct _ _ :=
    CC (arrow_dom f) (arrow_cod f).
Opaque cop_ff_cop.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
section_disp_data (three_disp C)

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
three_disp C f

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
∑ (xz : C ⟦ arrow_dom f, cop_ff_cop f ⟧)
(zy : C ⟦ cop_ff_cop f, arrow_cod f ⟧), xz · zy = f

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
∑ zy : C ⟦ cop_ff_cop f, arrow_cod f ⟧,
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f) · zy = f

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f)
· BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
    (identity (arrow_cod f)) = f

    abstract (
      exact (BinCoproductIn1Commutes _ _ _ (cop_ff_cop f) _ _ _)
    ).
  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : arrow C, three_disp C x,
 ∏ (x y : arrow C) (f : arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ f : arrow C,
   cop_ff_cop f,,
   BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
   BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
     (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
   cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f)
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
(cop_ff_cop f,,
 BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
 BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
   (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
 cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f) -->[
γ] (cop_ff_cop g,,
    BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
    BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
      (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
    cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof g)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C
⟦ pr1
    (cop_ff_cop f,,
     BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
     BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
       (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
     cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f),
pr1
  (cop_ff_cop g,,
   BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
   BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
     (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
   cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof g) ⟧
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
(λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr1
            (cop_ff_cop f,,
             BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
             BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
               (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
             cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
               f),
        pr1
          (cop_ff_cop g,,
           BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
           BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
             (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
           cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
             g) ⟧,
 pr12 (cop_ff_cop f,,
       BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
       BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
         (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
       cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f)
 · f0 =
 pr11 γ
 · pr12 (cop_ff_cop g,,
         BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
         BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
           (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
         cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof g)
 × pr122 (cop_ff_cop f,,
          BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
          BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
            (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
          cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f)
   · pr21 γ =
   f0
   · pr122 (cop_ff_cop g,,
            BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
            BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
              (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
            cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
              g)) ?pr1

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C
⟦ pr1
    (cop_ff_cop f,,
     BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
     BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
       (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
     cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f),
pr1
  (cop_ff_cop g,,
   BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
   BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
     (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
   cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof g) ⟧
 (* arrow dom f ∐ cod f --> dom g ∐ cod g
         simply given by γ: f --> g *)
      
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom g ⟧
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_cod f, arrow_cod g ⟧

      
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_dom f, arrow_dom g ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 γ).
      
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_cod f, arrow_cod g ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 γ).
    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
(λ f0 : C
        ⟦ pr1
            (cop_ff_cop f,,
             BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
             BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
               (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
             cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
               f),
        pr1
          (cop_ff_cop g,,
           BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
           BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
             (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
           cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
             g) ⟧,
 pr12 (cop_ff_cop f,,
       BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
       BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
         (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
       cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f)
 · f0 =
 pr11 γ
 · pr12 (cop_ff_cop g,,
         BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
         BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
           (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
         cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof g)
 × pr122 (cop_ff_cop f,,
          BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f),,
          BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f) (pr2 f)
            (identity (arrow_cod f)),,
          cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof f)
   · pr21 γ =
   f0
   · pr122 (cop_ff_cop g,,
            BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop g),,
            BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g) (pr2 g)
              (identity (arrow_cod g)),,
            cop_functorial_factorization_data_subproof
              g))
  (BinCoproductOfArrows C (cop_ff_cop f)
     (cop_ff_cop g) (arrow_mor00 γ) (arrow_mor11 γ))
 abstract (
        split; [apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
        use BinCoproductArrowsEq; [
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
          apply pathsinv0;
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
          etrans; [apply assoc'|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
          exact (arrow_mor_comm γ)
        |
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
          etrans; [apply id_left|];
          apply pathsinv0;
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
          etrans; [apply assoc'|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_precomposition;
                  apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
          apply id_right
        ]
      ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
section_disp_axioms cop_functorial_factorization_data


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
section_disp_axioms cop_functorial_factorization_data

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
pr1 (id_disp (cop_functorial_factorization_data x)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     cop_functorial_factorization_data (identity x))
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x, y, z: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     cop_functorial_factorization_data f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              cop_functorial_factorization_data
                                              g)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     cop_functorial_factorization_data (f · g))

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
pr1 (id_disp (cop_functorial_factorization_data x)) =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     cop_functorial_factorization_data (identity x))
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms
       cop_functorial_factorization_data (identity x)) =
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop x)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms
       cop_functorial_factorization_data (identity x)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop x)

    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms

BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms
       cop_functorial_factorization_data (identity x)) =
?b
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
?b = BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)
 
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
arrow_mor00 (identity x)
· BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x) =
BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop x)

      apply id_left.

CC: BinCoproducts C

CC: BinCoproducts C

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x: arrow C
arrow_mor11 (identity x)
· BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop x) =
BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop x)

      apply id_left.
  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
x, y, z: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms

      apply assoc.

CC: BinCoproducts C

· pr1
    (section_disp_on_morphisms
       cop_functorial_factorization_data f) = ?f'

?f'
· pr1

       cop_functorial_factorization_data g) =
arrow_mor11 (f · g) · BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop z)

g: arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧

CC: BinCoproducts C
x, y, z: arrow C

CC: BinCoproducts C
x, y, z: arrow C
f: arrow C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: arrow C ⟦ y, z ⟧

· (arrow_mor11 g · BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop z)) =
arrow_mor11 (f · g) · BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop z)

Qed.

Definition cop_functorial_factorization : functorial_factorization C :=
    (_,, cop_functorial_factorization_axioms).

    nat_trans _ _ :=
  (_,, cop_ff_comul_ax).

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
BinCoproductArrow
  (cop_ff_cop (fact_R cop_functorial_factorization f))
  (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop f)
     (BinCoproductIn1 (cop_ff_cop f))
     (BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop f)))
  (BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop f))
· three_mor12 (cop_functorial_factorization f) =
three_mor12
  (cop_functorial_factorization
     (fact_R cop_functorial_factorization f))
· identity
    (three_ob2
       (cop_functorial_factorization
          (fact_R cop_functorial_factorization f)))
 abstract (
      use BinCoproductArrowsEq; [
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply id_right|];
        etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
        use BinCoproductArrowsEq; [
            etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
            apply pathsinv0;
            etrans; [apply assoc|];
            etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
            etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
            reflexivity
        |
            etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
            apply pathsinv0;
            etrans; [apply assoc|];
            etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                      apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes _ _ _ (cop_ff_cop f))|];
            apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes
        ]
      |
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
        etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
        apply id_left
      ]
    ).
Defined.

    nat_trans _ _ :=
  (_,, cop_ff_mul_ax).

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
f: arrow C
arrow_mor11
  (# (fact_R cop_functorial_factorization)
     (disp_μ
        (R_monad_data cop_functorial_factorization
           cop_ff_mul) f)
   · disp_μ
       (R_monad_data cop_functorial_factorization
          cop_ff_mul) f) =
arrow_mor11
  (disp_μ
     (R_monad_data cop_functorial_factorization
        cop_ff_mul)
     (fact_R cop_functorial_factorization f)
   · disp_μ
       (R_monad_data cop_functorial_factorization
          cop_ff_mul) f)
 reflexivity.
Qed.

rnwfs_over cop_functorial_factorization
 exact cop_rnwfs_over.
Defined.

Definition cop_nwfs : nwfs C :=
    (_,, cop_nwfs_over).


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g → is_split_epi (pr2 g)

is_split_epi (pr2 g)

g: arrow C
αg: arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧
αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
is_split_epi (pr2 g)

     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
(λ g0 : C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧,
 Retracts.is_retraction g0 (pr2 g)) 
  ?pr1

 exact (BinCoproductIn2 _ · (arrow_mor00 αg)).

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
αg: arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧
αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop g)
· (pr2 (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g) · pr21 αg) = ?b
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
αg: arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧
αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
?b = identity (pr21 g)

· pr2 (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g) · pr21 αg =
identity (pr21 g)

g: arrow C

αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
BinCoproductIn2 (cop_ff_cop g)
· pr2 (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g) = ?f'
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
αg: arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧
αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
?f' · pr21 αg = identity (pr21 g)

            
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
αg: arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧
αgax: MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws
  (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
  (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
     (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g αg)
identity (arrow_cod g) · pr21 αg = identity (pr21 g)

    exact (arrow_mor11_eq (pr1 αgax)).
Qed.

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧

C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧
rel: Retracts.is_retraction g' (pr2 g)
BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
  (identity (arrow_dom g)) g' · pr2 g =
three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)
· identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g))
 abstract (
        use BinCoproductArrowsEq; [
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                    apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
          etrans; [apply id_left|];
          apply pathsinv0;
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                    apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes|];
          apply id_right
        | etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition;
                    apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
          etrans; [exact (rel)|];
          apply pathsinv0;
          etrans; [apply assoc|];
          etrans; [apply id_right|];
          etrans; [apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes|];
          reflexivity
        ]
      ).
  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧
rel: Retracts.is_retraction g' (pr2 g)
(λ α : arrow C ⟦ nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs g, g ⟧,
 MonadAlgebras.Algebra_laws (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
   (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
      (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g α))
  (mors_to_arrow_mor (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g))
     (pr2 g)
     (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
        (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
     (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
     (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g g' rel))

arrow_mor00
  (η (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
     (MonadAlgebras.Alg_carrier
        (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
        (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
           (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g
           (mors_to_arrow_mor
              (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)) (pr2 g)

   · MonadAlgebras.Alg_map (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)

          (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g

                (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
             (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
             (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g
                g' rel)))) =
arrow_mor00
  (identity
     (MonadAlgebras.Alg_carrier
        (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)

           (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g

                (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof
                   g g' rel)))) =
identity (arrow_dom g)

                (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
                (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof
                   g g' rel)))) = ?b
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧
rel: Retracts.is_retraction g' (pr2 g)
?b = g'

              rel))))

g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧

g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧
rel: Retracts.is_retraction g' (pr2 g)

        reflexivity.
    
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
g': C ⟦ pr21 g, pr11 g ⟧
rel: Retracts.is_retraction g' (pr2 g)
arrow_mor11
  (μ (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
     (MonadAlgebras.Alg_carrier
        (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
        (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
           (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g
           (mors_to_arrow_mor
              (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)) (pr2 g)
              (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
                 (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
              (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
              (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g
                 g' rel))))
   · MonadAlgebras.Alg_map (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
       (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
          (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g
          (mors_to_arrow_mor
             (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)) (pr2 g)
             (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
                (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
             (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
             (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g
                g' rel)))) =
arrow_mor11
  (# (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
     (MonadAlgebras.Alg_map (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
        (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
           (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g
           (mors_to_arrow_mor
              (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)) (pr2 g)
              (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
                 (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
              (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
              (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g
                 g' rel))))
   · MonadAlgebras.Alg_map (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs)
       (MonadAlgebras.make_Algebra_data
          (nwfs_R_monad cop_nwfs) g
          (mors_to_arrow_mor
             (three_mor12 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)) (pr2 g)
             (BinCoproductArrow (cop_ff_cop g)
                (identity (arrow_dom g)) g')
             (identity (three_ob2 (pr1 cop_nwfs g)))
             (cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map_subproof g
                g' rel))))
 reflexivity.
Qed.


C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g <-> is_split_epi (pr2 g)

CC: BinCoproducts C

nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g <-> is_split_epi (pr2 g)

CC: BinCoproducts C

CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
is_split_epi (pr2 g) → nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g

  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g → is_split_epi (pr2 g)
 apply cop_nwfs_r_map_is_split_epi.
  
C: category
CC: BinCoproducts C
g: arrow C
is_split_epi (pr2 g) → nwfs_R_maps cop_nwfs g
 apply cop_nwfs_split_epi_is_r_map.
Qed.

Transparent cop_ff_cop.
End Examples.
